paper-gray.$description: Paper Gray — Page canvas and hairline borders — the warm off-white ground that all type sits on

editorial-black.$description: Editorial Black — Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

charcoal-ink.$description: Charcoal Ink — Headings and emphasized prose — a near-black that softens headlines against the pure black of running text

soft-graphite.$description: Soft Graphite — Muted body text and secondary metadata — the gray that carries secondary sentences without competing with the lead

faded-pencil.$description: Faded Pencil — Tertiary annotations and the most restrained helper text — the lightest voice in the grayscale scale

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Surface highlights and inverse text on the black pill button

sapphire-beam.$description: Sapphire Beam — Decorative inline gradient — cyan-to-indigo mark used as a full-stop between sentences, never as a fill or background

ember-sunset.$description: Ember Sunset — Secondary decorative gradient — warm triple-stop used sparingly for moments that need a chromatic counterpoint to the blue

inter.$description: The sole typographic voice — used for everything from nav metadata to display headlines. Weight 400 carries running prose, weight 500 lifts section lead-ins and the primary action, weight 600 is reserved for the wordmark. The narrow three-size scale (14/16/40) is deliberate: hierarchy comes from luminance and weight, not from a cascading type ramp.

page-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: The warm off-white ground; all type and elements float on this single surface

pure-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Reserved for inverse text on the black button and any minimal card moments
